race.comment: GRAND VOILE (10) hit the frame two starts ago at Tuncurry but ran below par last time when eighth and beaten 5.5 lengths over 1400m at Gunnedah. This doesn't look as hard and is perfectly placed to bounce back. COURSE OF ACTION (1) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1600m at Scone, beaten 7 lengths into 11th. Perfectly placed and is sure to play a major role. THE DUX NUTS (4) was too good for a maiden field last start over 1200m at Inverell, scoring by a nose. Sparingly raced and has more to offer. Harder this time but still one to consider. FREEDOM TO ROAM (9) is a likely improver second up.
